headline: The Haters Are Back for Palantir Stock
summary: Palantir Technologies shares fell 7.3% Thursday to their lowest close in more than a month. Fears that newer artificial-intelligence technology will leave the data-analytics company in the dust have haunted Palantir over the past two months despite record revenue in the fourth quarter.

headline: Michael Burry: 'Anthropic is eating Palantir's lunch,' stock sinks
summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories. Palantir (PLTR) stock is sinking after "Big Short" investor Michael Burry said that Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) is "eating Palantir's lunch" in a now-deleted X post. CoreWeave (CRWV) and Meta (META) expanded their deal to $21 billion. BlackBerry (BB) stock is surging on the company's strong quarterly results.

headline: The AI Bubble That Isn’t
summary: I’ve been watching the AI infrastructure buildout pretty much every quarter for the past two years now, and I keep coming back to the same question: is this a bubble, or is this something different?
